title: BEM-842 short protocol check
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 19:55 (UTC+3)'
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
res=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
resp=[]
for p in files('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*'):
    txt=Path(p).read_text(errors='ignore')
    up=txt.upper(); low=(p+' '+txt).lower()
    if 'bem840' in low and 'DECISION:' in up and 'NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' not in up and 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' not in up:
        resp.append(p)
missing=[]
if not res: missing.append('dispatch_results')
if not (runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at')): missing.append('runtime')
if not resp: missing.append('real_bem840_response')
status='pass' if not missing else 'missing_'+'_'.join(missing)
state={'bem':'BEM-842','status':status,'missing':missing,'dispatch_result_count':len(res),'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'real_bem840_responses':resp[-5:],'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem842_short_protocol_response_check.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem842_short_protocol_response_check.md').write_text('# BEM-842 | Short Protocol Response Check | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem842_next.md').write_text('Next: repair first missing proof '+(missing[0] if missing else 'none')+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-842'+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem842_short_protocol_response_check.json','governance/reports/bem842_short_protocol_response_check.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem842_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Short check for BEM-840 protocol response triad: dispatch results, runtime, real BEM-840 Claude response')
"""
